name: Dynapac Co., Ltd.
summary: Dynapac Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells packaging materials in Japan and internationally. The company offers corrugated boards, paper cushioning materials, digital printing products, cardboard products, printing paper containers, flexible packaging, pulp molds, cardboard cushioning material, cardboard pallets, cardboard furniture, functional cardboards, and plastic corrugated plastic products. Its products are used in various industries, such as electrical/ machinery, chemicals/detergents, processed foods/fruits and vegetables, textiles, pottery/glass, mail order, etc. The company was founded in 2005 and is headquartered in Nagoya, Japan.
